note: Build broken into self-contained tasks, grouped by the phases in CLAUDE.md §10. Each task has its own folder (task.md + metadata.json) and is sized for a smaller model or a parallel run. Respect depends_on ordering. Do not start phase N+1 with phase N broken.

phases.0: Scaffold — pnpm workspace, Go module, SDK package + esbuild, example app, config
phases.1: Events core (the spine) — collector ingest + SQLite + SDK basics + live-feed dashboard
phases.2: Replay — rrweb + console plugin, gzip chunks, disk layout, player
phases.3: Errors + network — handlers, fetch/XHR patch, dedup
phases.4: Incident view + report widget — slice assembly, the killer feature
phases.5: Polish & release — aggregates, auth, packaging, docs, MIT

tasks.title: pnpm workspace + repo foundation
tasks.exit_check: `pnpm install` succeeds at the root; workspace resolves sdk/ and examples/*

tasks.title: Go module skeleton (spyglassd)
tasks.exit_check: `go build ./...` in collector/ succeeds; `spyglassd --config` flag parses

tasks.title: @spyglass/sdk package + esbuild + vitest
tasks.exit_check: `pnpm --filter @spyglass/sdk build` emits a bundle; `pnpm --filter @spyglass/sdk test` runs

tasks.title: examples/nextjs-demo skeleton
tasks.exit_check: `pnpm --filter nextjs-demo dev` boots a Next app that imports @spyglass/sdk from the workspace

tasks.title: spyglass.config.example.json
tasks.exit_check: Example config matches the schema in CLAUDE.md §6 exactly

tasks.title: Config loading + validation
tasks.exit_check: Loads spyglass.config.json, resolves env: refs, validates app keys; table-driven test green

tasks.title: SQLite schema v1 + migration runner
tasks.exit_check: Boot applies numbered migrations idempotently; events+sessions tables and indexes exist

tasks.title: Store: open WAL DB + prepared inserts
tasks.exit_check: Opens SQLite in WAL mode, runs migrations, exposes a batched-insert API

tasks.title: POST /v1/events (auth, CORS, limits)
tasks.exit_check: Batched JSON inserted in one tx; app-key checked; CORS allowlist + size cap + rate limit enforced; table-driven test

tasks.title: GET /v1/query/events + /v1/query/users
tasks.exit_check: Filtered event stream (user/type/from/to) and active-users list return correct JSON; table-driven test

tasks.title: HTTP server + /v1 router + shutdown
tasks.exit_check: spyglassd boots, serves /v1 routes from config listen addr, graceful shutdown on SIGINT

tasks.title: spyglass.init() + config + types
tasks.exit_check: init() validates config, stores singleton state; vitest unit test

tasks.title: Session id + 30min idle reset
tasks.exit_check: Random id in sessionStorage; new id after 30min idle; vitest with faked time

tasks.title: Event queue + batching + transport
tasks.exit_check: Flush every 5s or 20 events via fetch POST to /v1/events; vitest

tasks.title: sendBeacon on tab close
tasks.exit_check: visibilitychange/pagehide flushes the queue via navigator.sendBeacon

tasks.title: capture(), pageview(), setUser()
tasks.exit_check: capture/pageview/setUser enqueue correctly-shaped events; vitest

tasks.title: <SpyglassProvider> app-router pageviews
tasks.exit_check: Provider auto-fires pageviews on route change via usePathname/useSearchParams

tasks.title: Preact dashboard shell + Go embed
tasks.exit_check: `GET /` serves the embedded Preact SPA built by esbuild

tasks.title: Live feed view + filters
tasks.exit_check: Live feed lists events from /v1/query/events, filterable by user/type/app — PHASE 1 EXIT

tasks.title: rrweb record + console plugin (lazy)
tasks.exit_check: When replay:true, rrweb + console plugin load as a separate chunk and start recording

tasks.title: ~10s chunking + CompressionStream gzip
tasks.exit_check: rrweb events batched into ~10s gzipped chunks via native CompressionStream

tasks.title: Replay upload + backpressure
tasks.exit_check: POST /v1/replay?session=&seq=; under backpressure, drop replay before events

tasks.title: POST /v1/replay → disk
tasks.exit_check: Gzipped chunk written to disk; sessions.chunk_count bumped; table-driven test

tasks.title: Replay disk layout + meta.json seek index
tasks.exit_check: replays/{session}/ holds chunks + meta.json timestamp index for seeking

tasks.title: GET /v1/sessions/:id/replay (manifest + stream)
tasks.exit_check: Returns chunk manifest and streams individual chunks for the player

tasks.title: Daily retention sweep
tasks.exit_check: Daily in-process sweep deletes replay dirs older than replays_days (events_days=0 keeps forever)

tasks.title: rrweb-player view + console pane
tasks.exit_check: Watch any session end-to-end with seek + console pane — PHASE 2 EXIT

tasks.title: Error handlers + dedup
tasks.exit_check: onerror/unhandledrejection/console.error captured as error events, deduped within 5s; vitest

tasks.title: fetch + XHR interception (metadata)
tasks.exit_check: fetch/XHR produce network events with method/url/status/duration/sizes; auth headers never recorded

tasks.title: Opt-in body capture (allow-list)
tasks.exit_check: Bodies captured only for allow-listed route prefixes, truncated to 2KB

tasks.title: User timeline view
tasks.exit_check: Pick user → sessions → chronological breadcrumbs (pageviews, captures, network, errors)

tasks.title: Error list + network rows
tasks.exit_check: Throw in dev app → error appears with stack, linked to its session — PHASE 3 EXIT

tasks.title: Bug-report widget (Shadow DOM)
tasks.exit_check: Floating button → comment box → emits bug_report event; Shadow DOM, no style bleed

tasks.title: spyglass.report() programmatic
tasks.exit_check: report('msg') emits a bug_report event without the widget UI; vitest

tasks.title: Opt-in autocapture (click + change)
tasks.exit_check: autocapture:true lazy-loads a module recording clicks + form changes; zero bytes when off

tasks.title: GET /v1/incidents/:event_id (slice assembly)
tasks.exit_check: For an error/bug_report event, assemble [ts−60s, ts+10s] slice: events + replay cue + network + console refs

tasks.title: Incident view (the killer page)
tasks.exit_check: Click report → open incident → replay cued to that exact moment — PHASE 4 EXIT

tasks.title: GET /v1/query/funnel
tasks.exit_check: ?steps=a,b,c returns a simple SQL step funnel; table-driven test

tasks.title: Aggregates view (DAU, top events/pages, errors)
tasks.exit_check: DAU, top events, top pages, error counts by day via GROUP BY

tasks.title: Dashboard shared-password auth
tasks.exit_check: Dashboard + query routes gated by the single shared password (auth.dashboard_password)

tasks.title: Packaging: cross-compile + npx wrapper + Docker
tasks.exit_check: Static binaries for darwin/linux amd64+arm64; npx/install path; Docker example

tasks.title: README + docs MDX + MIT license
tasks.exit_check: README in dynamoip voice; docs/ MDX expanded; MIT license present

tasks.title: Publish @spyglass/sdk + size budget gate
tasks.exit_check: Core ≤5KB gz (rrweb lazy); package publishes to npm

tasks.title: Optional Slack webhook on bug_report
tasks.exit_check: When configured, a new bug_report POSTs a link to the incident to a Slack webhook; off by default
